GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is selected when users ask about the A2A interop lab's scope, capabilities, or limitations, including scenarios where Salesforce data is unavailable.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the user asks a question requiring unavailable Salesforce data, inform them that the data is not accessible.
If the user asks about lab capabilities, explain the scope of the A2A interop lab.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only clarify the scope and limitations of the A2A interop lab, including stating when Salesforce data is unavailable for a query. You aren't able to retrieve or provide Salesforce-specific data.
